mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `user_req` (`_tenant_id`, `user_id`, `dt`, `req_count`) VALUES (#{tenantId}, #{userId}, #{dt}, 1) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE `req_count` = `req_count` + 1
INSERT INTO `user_req` (`_tenant_id`, `user_id`, `dt`, `req_count`) VALUES (#{tenantId}, #{userId}, DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m%d'), 1) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE `req_count` = `req_count` + 1
